pages.title: Old Mill Road
pages.body: A muddy track between the village and the ruined mill. The party camped here after [[The Missing Ledger]] went sideways.

pages.title: Brightquill Yard
pages.body: Merchant wagons and a small shrine. [[Lyra Moonfall]] knows the family clerk here.

pages.title: Marta the Innkeeper
pages.body: Runs the Crossroads Inn. Heard rumors about [[Old Mill Road]] after dark.

pages.title: The Missing Ledger
pages.body: Recover the Brightquill shipping ledger before the festival. Party-visible objective.

pages.title: Party Recap — Session Zero
pages.body: We agreed to share loot and rotate watch. Finn wants to scout [[Old Mill Road]] first.

pages.title: DM Thread — Hidden Patron
pages.body: The ledger theft was staged. The real prize is a map fragment in [[Brightquill Yard]].

pages.title: Session 1 Notes
pages.body: Introduced the party at the Crossroads Inn. Hook: [[The Missing Ledger]].

calendarEvents.title: Festival Eve Deadline
calendarEvents.description: Ledger must be found before the Brightquill festival.
